name: Stepper
description: Displays ordered process steps with optional nested substeps and stage/status indicators.

step.description.description: Optional secondary description under the label

step.stage.description: Step stage appearance when no status override is provided

step.status.description: Status override that takes precedence over stage styling

step.expanded.description: Controlled expanded state for steps with nested substeps

step.defaultExpanded.description: Initial expanded state for uncontrolled nested substeps

step.onToggle.description: Callback fired when a nested step expand trigger is toggled

slots.children: Render Step elements as ordered items; nested Step children are supported in vertical orientation only

keyboard: Tab — moves focus to the next expand button for steps with nested substeps
Shift + Tab — moves focus to the previous expand button
Enter / Space — toggles expand/collapse on nested-step expand buttons
aria: aria-label — provide contextual label on Stepper for process name
aria-current="step" is applied to active steps
When steps are decorative/non-interactive, do not use Stepper as page navigation
